creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Thu, Aug 05, 2010 at 13:25:51 -0700, Stanislav Sedov wrote:
> Hi, Li-Wen!
> 
> I looked into your patch and found a problem here: the pkg-plist
> is broken.  The versioned library symlink is both included into
> pkg-plist and created by @exec action.  If you're including the symlink
> into the package, you don't need @exec line, and vice versa.

Yes you're right...  I've updated the patch at
http://people.freebsd.org/~lwhsu/lensfun.diff

Barov, please approve it.

Thanks,
	Li-Wen

-- 
Li-Wen Hsu <lwhsu AT FreeBSD.org>
http://lwhsu.org
